The '''Armalat''' [[Species/Legends|species]] was a giant, [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned non-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] race that weighed several hundred kilos. Each one of their hands only had three fingers. Some Armalat settled on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]], and were represented by [[Tolut]] on the [[Unity of Community]]'s [[Unity Council]].

{{Species-stub}}
